notes.anchor: he will still be here by the tenth before the Kalends
notes.note: Roman dates were counted inclusively backward from three fixed points; the 'tenth before the Kalends' of the following month falls on 23 March (counting both endpoints). Cicero is fixing when Sicca will reach him at Astura.

notes.anchor: About what you write of Nicias
notes.note: Nicias of Cos was a learned grammarian and literary companion of Cicero's circle. Cicero declines his company not from coolness but because his own grief makes him poor host to so delicate and fastidious a guest.
